name: @zmice/toolkit
description: Source-of-truth content package for zc AI Coding Toolkit skills, commands, and agents

scripts.test: pnpm run build && node --test dist/loaders.test.js dist/manifests.test.js dist/content-lint.test.js dist/query.test.js dist/governance/upstreams.test.js
scripts.verify: pnpm run lint && pnpm run test && pnpm run build && pnpm run generate
